title: 80hr Rechargeable Neck Light
description: This Glocusent reading light owns 3 useful color temperature modes: yellow(3000K), warm white(4000K) and cool white(6000K). Each neck light head owns an independent switch for 3 brightness levels dimmable.

title: LOVEVOOK Travel Backpack
description: Measuring 18x14x8 inches, meets size requirements for Spirit, Frontier & more. This carry on backpack fits under seats or in overhead bins—no checked baggage fees

title: Web Launcher Spider String Shooter
description: Become a superhero: This is a web launcher that can be repeatedly launched, with the iconic movements of superheroes; every child (or man-child) can become a superhero.

title: Hey, Have You Tried Cheese Dish Towel
description: Premium Quality & Design: Featuring the bold "Hey, Have You Tried Cheese" design, this kitchen dish towel is made from 100% soft, super-absorbent cotton.
